lines.speaker: Father Urhney
lines.text: Go away! I'm meditating!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, that's friendly.

lines.speaker: Father Urhney
lines.text: I SAID go AWAY.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, okay... sheesh, what a grouch.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've come to repossess your house.

lines.speaker: Father Urhney
lines.text: Under what grounds???

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Repeated failure on mortgage repayments.

lines.speaker: Father Urhney
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Father Urhney
lines.text: But... I don't have a mortgage! I built this house myself!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry. I must have got the wrong address. All the houses look the same around here.

lines.speaker: Father Urhney
lines.text: What? What houses? What ARE you talking about???

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Never mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't know. I just wanted this house...

lines.speaker: Father Urhney
lines.text: Oh... go away and stop wasting my time!

lines.speaker: Father Urhney
lines.text: Go away! I'm meditating!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've lost the Amulet of Ghostspeak.

lines.speaker: Father Urhney
lines.text: What are you talking about? I can see you've got it with you!

lines.speaker: Father Urhney
lines.text: You come here wasting my time... Has it even occurred to you that you've got it stored somewhere? Now GO AWAY!

lines.speaker: Father Urhney
lines.text: How careless can you get? Those things aren't easy to come by you know! Now clear some space in your inventory and I'll give you another one.

lines.speaker: Father Urhney
lines.text: How careless can you get? Those things aren't easy to come by you know! It's a good job I've got a spare.

lines.speaker: Father Urhney
lines.text: Be more careful this time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, I'll try to be.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello?

lines.speaker: Father Urhney
lines.text: At last! The voice of Saradomin! My years of meditation have paid off!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Um...

lines.speaker: Father Urhney
lines.text: O mighty Saradomin! What is your message to me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Stop sitting around in a house in a swamp and go and do something useful!

lines.speaker: Father Urhney
lines.text: Oh, thank you Saradomin! I will meditate on what this message means!
